name: Peach 24x30 Garage Shed Plan - A Rustic-Modern Garage with Warm Siding & Carriage Barn Doors
open_features: 24x30 Garage Shed with Classic Gable Roof
A high-pitch roof provides incredible overhead clearance for storage, shelving, and flexible workshop setups - perfect for all-season protection.
Straightforward framing, clean roof geometry, and step-by-step build plans make this project easy for both beginners and pro builders.
Rustic wooden carriage doors with upper glass panels allow smooth access for cars, tools, bikes, lawn equipment, and workshop materials - all while enhancing curb appeal.
Peach horizontal siding paired with crisp white trim and natural wood textures creates a warm, inviting exterior with a modern-rustic edge.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Peach Garage Shed Plan - a 24x30 spacious garage and workspace solution designed for warmth, charm, and clean architectural simplicity. With its tall gable roof, peach-toned horizontal siding, and rustic barn-style double garage doors, the Peach offers timeless visual appeal with the practical utility modern homeowners need. Whether you're building a two-vehicle garage, a hobby studio, a garden equipment hub, or a multi-purpose backyard workshop,...
